articles.summary: 为解决VLA模型因预训练于静态图文对而缺乏连续接触动力学理解的问题，提出World Pilot框架，将世界-动作先验注入策略，增强机器人操作任务中的动态感知与鲁棒性，在分布内外场景中均表现优异。

articles.title: Verifiable Environments Are LEGO Bricks: Recursive Composition for Reasoning Generalization

articles.title: Breaking Entropy Bounds: Accelerating RL Training via MTP with Rejection Sampling

articles.title: InternVideo3: Agentify Foundation Models with Multimodal Contextual Reasoning

articles.title: Agentic Environment Engineering for Large Language Models: A Survey of Environment Modeling, Synthesis, Evaluation, and Application

articles.title: World Model Self-Distillation: Training World Models to Solve General Tasks
